name: OpenClaw
summary: OpenClaw Image pixel-limit guard can fail open on sips and allow decompression-bomb DoS
description:
Summary
Image pixel-limit guard can fail open on sips and allow decompression-bomb DoS

Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: medium
- Assessment: Shipped v2026.3.28 image processing could fail open on oversized pixel counts and allow decompression-bomb DoS, an availability issue that is valid at medium.

Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: openclaw (npm)
- Latest published npm version: 2026.3.31
- Vulnerable version range: <=2026.3.28
- Patched versions: >= 2026.3.31
- First stable tag containing the fix: v2026.3.31
suggestion: Upgrade openclaw to >= 2026.3.31 or later. Commit(s) - 0ed4f8a72bb140045962e97ab01c94c076b758a4 — 2026-03-31T22:52:55+09:00
